pages.title: Part I — The Science
pages.description: Why your brain forgets, how memory actually works, and the science behind every technique in this system.

pages.title: Part II — Voice & Fluency §3-6
pages.description: The instrument, the mechanics, the engine, and the architecture — voice, pronunciation, fluency, and structured speaking frameworks.

pages.title: Part II — Thinking & Communication §7–16
pages.description: Public speaking, deep learning systems, 30 mental models, workplace communication, and brain-freeze elimination.

pages.title: Part II — Advanced Skills §17–27
pages.description: Polymath knowledge, writing as thinking, decision-making, deep work, Stoicism, leadership, and financial literacy.

pages.title: Part III & IV — Drills & Execution Plan
pages.description: The complete drill library, weekly challenges, conversation simulations, and the phased 90-day execution framework.

pages.title: Part V — Resources
pages.description: Book recommendations, tools, Anki deck starters, a glossary of every framework, and 12 principles worth printing.

pages.title: 90-Day Action Plan
pages.description: Interactive day-by-day, week-by-week tracker with a streak counter, daily checklists, and links to every related section.
